claim: R&D Lab OS is currently framed as a portable research operating layer, not a model-training system.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: README says: 'R&D Lab OS is a portable research operating layer for projects.' It also says the repo is not a model-training project.
notes: Supports keeping idea lab artifact-first instead of ML/backend-first.

claim: The toolkit supports both repo-local and project-local modes, with project-local state under .heurema/rdlab.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: README describes repo-local mode under runs/ and project-local mode under .heurema/rdlab/.
notes: Justifies dogfooding project-local mode inside this repo.

claim: The evidence ledger is the source of truth, while the final memo is derivative.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: README states: 'The final memo is not the source of truth. The evidence ledger is.'
notes: Constrains idea discussion to ledger-backed claims.

claim: Agent instructions require filling artifacts in order and adding ledger claims before synthesis.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: AGENTS.md says to create/update a run folder, fill artifacts in order, avoid final memo before evidence, add claims to ledger before synthesizing, and run validate_run.py.
notes: Defines how this run should be operated.

claim: Project-local work should read providers.toml and use provider_router.py when a second provider or critic pass is needed.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: AGENTS.md says to read rdlab.toml, sources.toml, topics.toml, and providers.toml, and to use scripts/provider_router.py for subscription-only provider selection when a second provider/critic pass is needed.
notes: Supports multi-provider discussion rather than a single-agent pass.

claim: The portable project layer explicitly includes providers.toml plus ideas and experiments directories.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: The documented project structure includes rdlab.toml, sources.toml, topics.toml, providers.toml, runs, memory, watch, decisions, ideas, and experiments.
notes: Supports using this lab for idea discovery and experiment planning.

claim: The project-lab template already has idea, experiment, and memory update artifacts.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: Docs say the project-lab template extends legacy runs with change tracking, ideas, experiments, and explicit memory update artifacts.
notes: Avoids creating new heavy structures before testing existing artifacts.

claim: The subscription provider router is designed to read providers.toml and shell out to local CLI tools without API-key provider flows.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: Docs say the router reads .heurema/rdlab/providers.toml, does not store secrets, does not use API-key provider flows, and shells out to configured local CLI tools.
notes: Supports subscription-only debate for idea critique.

claim: The first source snapshot checked 8 watched sources successfully and skipped 1 unwatched source.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: Snapshot JSON reports sources_checked=8, sources_skipped=1, and status ok for local files plus GitHub README and OpenAI Codex skills URL.
notes: Confirms external source pass and local source pass completed.

claim: The provider router probe found four usable subscription provider routes for this project lab.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: doctor --probe returned ok for claude-sonnet, claude-haiku, vibe-default, and agy-default.
conflicts: Gemini and opencode were previously blocked in local checks and are disabled by default.
notes: Supports independent provider critique in this run.

claim: Vibe suggested practical next ideas including code-to-idea extraction, discussion import, lab-to-lab idea bridge, pipeline report, and quick scout mode.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: Vibe proposed five ideas and warned about false positives, loss of conversational nuance, privacy boundaries, UI creep, and skipping deep research.
conflicts: Provider output is not authoritative evidence; it is an ideation signal.
notes: Used as candidate idea input only.

claim: Agy critic prioritized idea ledger, adversarial provider debate, and scorecards; deferred semantic evolution tracking; stopped vector DB clustering.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: Agy marked Hypothesis/Idea Ledger, Adversarial Provider Debate, and Idea Triage Scorecards as KEEP; Git diff evolution as DEFER; semantic clustering/vector DB as STOP.
conflicts: Provider output is not authoritative evidence; it is critic signal.
notes: Used to triage ideas and experiments.
